title: limonium doriae
intro: Limonium doriae, also known as Doran's sea lavender or Doria's sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Limonium doriae include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Limonium doriae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
